title: UX spec (UX) front-matter
description: Deterministic contract for the YAML front-matter of every specs/ux/UX-##.md file. Produced in Phase 3 (Design & Solution Decomposition) as a separately-reviewable experience artifact (Gate B). The COMPILER zones (traceability chain DES<-REQ<-INTK, provenance) are regenerated verbatim from the implemented design by scripts/compile_design.py and guarded by spec_hash; the FILL zones (surfaces, client logic, components, navigation, accessibility, open-questions) are authored by the Copilot cloud agent. Body-zone, traceability and hash rules are checked by scripts/validate_design.py.

satisfies.description: The atomic REQ ids this experience serves. Must equal the satisfies of implements_design.

implements_design.description: The single design spec this experience realises (1:1).

spec_hash.description: SHA-256 over the COMPILER zones (lowercase hex). Recomputed and checked by scripts/compile_design.py and scripts/validate_design.py.
